visual_text: (1) A young boy with short black hair, wearing brown pajamas patterned with bubble tea illustrations, sits on the edge of a light-colored wooden coffee table in a modern living room. He is facing away from the camera, holding a small red toy car in his right hand while staring intently at a large flat-screen television showing colorful fireworks bursting against a dark blue sky. The room is brightly lit by overhead lights, revealing a minimalist white wall unit with a PlayStation 5 and various small electronics tucked into the shelves. (2) Another boy, also in matching bubble tea pajamas and wearing glasses, is sitting on the table next to the first boy. In the background, visible through a large glass window that shows a dark night sky and city lights, a woman in a pink sweatshirt and shorts stands by a white sofa. She is holding a smartphone and waving her hand enthusiastically while cheering. A small decorated Christmas tree with red ornaments and white lights stands in the corner of the room near the window. (3) The camera pans closer to the television screen, which now displays the Taipei 101 tower lit up with green and yellow lights as part of the 2025 New Year's Eve fireworks show. The logo 'TVBS HD LIVE' is visible in the top right corner. One of the boys turns toward the camera with a wide, joyful smile, his eyes squinted with excitement, before looking back at the screen. The furniture, including the white sofa and grey rug, creates a cozy, domestic environment under the warm interior lighting. (4) One of the boys stands up from the wooden table and walks toward the TV, extending his hand to point directly at the fireworks exploding around the Taipei 101 tower on the screen. After pointing, he quickly turns around and hops back onto the table to rejoin his sibling, both children continuing to watch the broadcast with high energy and visible fascination.

(1) A young boy with short black hair wearing tan pajamas with brown circle patterns stands in a brightly lit modern indoor hallway. He holds a white piece of paper with a hand-drawn Chinese character '年' and some small snowflake-like drawings. He smiles broadly at the camera with a joyful expression. (2) The boy squats down on the light-colored wood-grain flooring and carefully places the paper flat on the ground. He then stands up, positions himself in front of the paper, and jumps over it, landing successfully while looking back at the camera. (3) The boy reaches down to pick the paper back up, showing it closely to the lens. The background shows white minimalist cabinetry and a door frame. (4) The boy places the paper back on the floor. A woman wearing a pink hooded tracksuit and a white face mask enters the frame from the left and steps over the paper. Another slightly older boy wearing black-rimmed glasses and identical patterned pajamas follows her, stepping over the paper with a smile. (5) The scene shifts to a living room area with a large white sectional sofa and a Christmas tree visible in the background. The family members are seen jumping and raising their arms in celebration. Hand-held camera movements follow the action, creating a dynamic and home-movie feel with natural indoor lighting.

(1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white oversized sweatshirt with black straps, speaks earnestly into a large black studio microphone. She gestures with her hands while looking slightly off-camera toward another speaker. The background is a simple, uniform teal curtain. (2) Cut to a man with short brown hair, wearing a beige and grey color-blocked sweater and white over-ear headphones, listening and interjecting into his microphone. The background features a brick wall lined with colorful character figurines, such as Pinocchio and Buzz Lightyear. (3) Transition back to the first woman, whose expression becomes visibly softer and emotional. She continues speaking while using her fingers to wipe away tears from her eyes. The studio lighting remains bright and even. (4) A brief cutaway shows a second woman with hair in pigtails wearing a black hoodie, looking down at a smartphone she is holding. She is seated next to the man on a sofa decorated with colorful pillows. (5) A man wearing a large, comical orange mask with blue hair and a wide-eyed expression claps his hands together in a red armchair. He is positioned against the same teal curtain background as the first speaker. (6) The video returns to the first woman, who is now visibly crying and wiping her face with a white tissue. She continues her narrative with a trembling expression as the camera captures her emotional reaction in a medium close-up.

(1) The scene begins with a close-up of a white heart-shaped snowball hanging from a thin, needle-covered branch of an evergreen tree. The background is a soft-focus forest with dappled sunlight. (2) A hand wearing a black and white patterned glove holds a similar white snow heart up toward the camera lens, showcasing its shape. (3) Sunlight sparkles on the surface of another snow heart hanging on a branch, highlighting its icy texture in a tight close-up shot. (4) A man wearing a black and white patterned jacket with an orange vest is visible in the blurry background of a snowy park. (5) The camera captures the man in a medium shot as he crouches on the snowy ground, using a bright red heart-shaped plastic snowball maker to press snow. (6) A close-up shows the red tool opening to reveal a perfectly formed snow heart. (7) The man carefully hangs a red-colored snow heart onto the tree branch next to the white ones. (8) He stands back and gestures excitedly toward the tree, which is now decorated with multiple hearts. (9) A woman wearing a yellow long-sleeve shirt and pink overalls enters the frame; she smiles broadly and looks at the decorated tree. (10) The couple stands together in front of the tree, both smiling and making small finger-heart gestures toward the camera in a medium full shot.

(1) A man with short brown hair in a bright orange hoodie and a woman with her hair in two small buns wearing a dark red hoodie stand in a modern, brightly lit kitchen. Behind them is a white refrigerator decorated with a red diamond-shaped New Year sticker and a red lantern hanging from the ceiling. On the table in front of them is a lavish spread of Chinese New Year dishes, including a whole cooked crab, shrimp, and meat platters. They are smiling broadly and waving energetically toward the camera. (2) The camera cuts to close-up shots of several beverage bottles from the brand OKASANG arranged on the table next to the festive food. The man holds up a dark-colored bottle with a black label, showing it to the viewers while gesturing with his other hand. The lighting remains bright and consistent, emphasizing the product packaging and the vibrant colors of the food. (3) The woman is shown holding two different colored bottles, one with a green label and one with a purple label, while smiling and nodding. She then pours a yellowish-brown liquid from a clear bottle into a glass, showcasing the smooth flow of the beverage. The setting remains the kitchen with various kitchen appliances like a stove and cabinets visible in the background. (4) The woman takes a sip of the drink from the glass, closing her eyes briefly as if enjoying the taste, while the man continues to point at the bottles lined up on the counter. The camera uses quick cuts to alternate between their expressions and the specific products they are highlighting. (5) They transition to presenting a red rectangular box titled 'Red Dates Extract'. The man and woman both hold copies of the box and small individual packets, pointing to the text on the packaging. The video ends with them holding red OKASANG gift bags and more product boxes, waving and smiling festively at the camera in a wide-angled shot.

(1) The scene opens in a well-lit indoor studio where a man and a woman sit at a light-colored wooden desk, both wearing matching bright orange jumpsuits with various professional-looking patches on the chest and sleeves. The man, with styled brown hair, holds white papers and looks at them with an intense expression while speaking. (2) As the man continues his animated explanation, he gestures frequently with his hands, pointing at the camera and the papers. The woman sits beside him, looking on and occasionally nodding. The background consists of vertical blue curtains and professional microphones mounted on stands, creating a broadcast or podcast environment. (3) The video transitions into a series of rapid montage clips showing factory production environments. These shots include a woman in a mask and hairnet holding a patterned package, a production line for colorful safety helmets, and a factory worker handling boxes. These scenes are brightly lit with industrial lighting and show various manufacturing objects. (4) The camera returns to the studio where the man performs an extremely exaggerated reaction, widening his eyes and mouth in shock or denial. Large, bold Traditional Chinese text overlays appear on the screen to emphasize his points. The man continues to gesture wildly as he concludes his statement while the woman remains more composed.

(1) Close-up shot of a printed document held by a woman. The camera pans up to show a woman reading the text with a neutral expression. She is wearing an orange uniform similar to the man. The lighting is bright and studio-focused. (2) Sudden cut to a man with short brown hair, also in an orange uniform. He looks shocked, eyes wide, mouth agape, holding the same papers. Large variety text overlays flash on the screen. (3) The man becomes highly animated, waving his hands and pointing to the papers. A screenshot of a Wikipedia page is superimposed on the frame with highlights on specific dates and milestones. (4) The man shouts directly at the camera, pointing aggressively. Various colorful, bold text overlays flash on the screen matching his emphasized words. (5) Final shot shows the man leaning forward over a wooden desk, still shouting and gesturing, while the woman beside him smiles. A smartphone and microphone are visible on the desk.

(1) A man with short, styled brown hair and an expressive face is wearing a bright orange jumpsuit with reflective silver tape and various patches. He sits in a studio setting against a backdrop of vertical teal curtains. Large white Chinese characters appear as an overlay. He looks directly at the camera with wide eyes and an open mouth. (2) The man points his finger toward the left side of the frame as a logo with the text 'GA GARMY' and pixelated graphics appears in the center. He holds several white papers in his other hand, gesturing with them. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a professional studio setup. (3) A woman with long dark hair, wearing an identical orange jumpsuit, enters the frame and sits next to him. They both look at the papers on the desk. Dynamic red and yellow graphic overlays resembling flames and sparkles appear around the man as he continues to speak animatedly, his facial expressions shifting rapidly between shock and excitement. (4) A small picture-in-picture video appears, showing the man in the same orange uniform standing outdoors, pointing at a sign. In the main frame, he continues to wave his papers and point his finger towards the camera. The woman beside him laughs and looks at the papers. (5) The man leans closer to the camera, his eyes bulging slightly for comedic effect. He continues to gesture aggressively with the papers in his hand. The background remains the static teal curtain, but the visual rhythm is maintained through frequent jump cuts and the reappearance of various text overlays.

(1) A man with brown hair and an orange rescue-style uniform is seated at a table, holding a stack of papers and speaking directly to the camera with an expressive face. He sits against a plain teal backdrop with a small microphone and phone visible on the table. (2) The scene transitions into a fast-paced sequence where the man uses large hand gestures to emphasize 'Steps'. A woman with long dark hair sits next to him, occasionally reacting to his energetic performance. (3) The man demonstrates various dramatic scenarios, including pointing aggressively, pretending to throw papers, and feigning distress. Graphic overlays of fire and speech bubbles appear around him as he acts out making up rumors. (4) The lighting remains bright and consistent throughout the studio setting. The man continues his exaggerated movements, eventually simulating a crying fit with digital tear effects and then pretending to flee, gesturing outward. (5) In the final phase, the man and woman both look directly at the camera, inviting interaction, with the man maintaining a playful, challenging smirk.

(1) Indoor office setting. A man in a red sweatshirt enters from the right, walking towards a man in a white t-shirt and another wearing a large, comical orange character mask sitting at a wooden table. The lighting is bright and even. Behind them are white storage lockers and a green curtained window. (2) Close-up shots focusing on the three men. The man in white holds a smartphone, showing something to the others. Their facial expressions are exaggeratedly surprised and skeptical. The man in red points toward the phone screen with his finger while speaking. (3) The scene shifts to a studio environment where the man in white, now wearing black sunglasses and a thick gold chain, rhythmically tosses stacks of yellow and white papers into the air. He is seated at a white desk with a computer monitor. (4) A series of rapid cuts show group dance sequences in a brightly lit hallway. Several individuals wear the same orange masks and striped shirts, performing synchronized, high-energy arm movements and pointing gestures. Large, bold white and yellow text overlays the center of the frame. (5) Montage of specific actions: a person in an orange mask holds a toy car; another displays an orange luxury shopping bag; a pair of shiny silver high heels is shown close to the camera lens. The man in the white shirt continues to lead the dance moves with exaggerated hip and arm motions. (6) The lighting environment alternates between the bright office and a darker space with glowing blue and white ceiling lights. The group continues their energetic choreography, interacting with props like boxing gloves and paper shopping bags. (7) Final sequence shows the man in white leaning back on a chair, tossing more paper at the camera. The video concludes with a black screen featuring massive, stylized text characters in white and yellow fills.

(1) A man with reddish-brown hair wearing a horizontal striped long-sleeve shirt stands center, gesturing energetically. To his right, a woman with dark hair in a cream-colored sweater smiles and holds a pamphlet. To his left stands a person wearing a large, smiling cartoon deity mask with a red shirt and olive-green pants. They are outdoors on a wooden platform surrounded by lush green trees and modern residential buildings in the background under natural daylight. The man holds up a transparent acrylic donation box with colorful graphics. (2) The camera provides a close-up view of the donation box, showing specific text and permit numbers clearly. Then it cuts back to the group where the man points to a large yellow text overlay on the screen while the masked character claps rhythmically. The woman remains smiling, looking directly at the camera. (3) The man continues to speak with high energy, pointing towards the camera and the box. Large colorful text overlays appear periodically at the bottom and middle of the frame. The background remains consistent with soft outdoor lighting. (4) In the final segment, the man leans closer to the camera for an emotional appeal, holding the donation box prominently. The trio wave and gesture together as more text overlays fill the screen, concluding the presentation in the same outdoor setting.

(1) The camera executes a slow, sweeping pan to the right across a tranquil public park. The setting is dominated by green grass, mature leafy trees with dark trunks, and a grey brick-paved walkway. A stone pavilion is visible in the distant background under a slightly overcast sky. (2) The camera focuses on two paper shopping bags resting on the top rail of a dark brown wooden fence. One bag is a classic bright orange Hermes bag with black handles and logo; the other is a pale yellow bag decorated with numerous colorful smiley-face icons in red, blue, green, and orange. (3) A young man with short brown hair, wearing a bright yellow and white color-blocked polo shirt and loose blue denim jeans, walks into the frame from the right. He wears white earbuds and looks toward the bags with an exaggerated expression of agitation and concern. (4) The man stands before the bags, gesturing toward them with both hands in a scolding manner. He points directly at the yellow bag and occasionally taps the wooden fence rail. His body language is highly animated, leaning in and out as he appears to confront the inanimate objects.

(1) A man with short brown hair, wearing white over-ear headphones and a beige sweatshirt, sits on a brown leather sofa in a studio. He speaks into a black professional microphone, gesturing with his hands. Behind him is a light-colored brick wall with built-in shelves displaying various colorful figurines, including Pinocchio and other pop-culture characters. (2) A static image is overlaid on the screen showing a shirtless muscular man with a serious expression; white and gold text is superimposed on this image. (3) The man on the sofa points and makes a finger-heart gesture, laughing. (4) An insert graphic appears showing a side-by-side comparison of two men in white shirts, one a professional portrait and the other a similar pose. (5) A person wearing a large, yellow cartoon mask with a huge smile and black hair is shown in a close-up against a teal background. (6) A woman with black hair in a ponytail, wearing a white sweater, sits on the same sofa next to a patterned pillow, laughing heartily with her eyes closed.

(1) A woman in pink and white floral pajamas stands in a modern kitchen with light wood-tiled floors and minimalist white cabinets. She turns around with a sleepy, slightly confused facial expression, looking toward the camera. (2) She walks across the room to a tall white cabinet unit, reaches into a side shelf, and retrieves a purple pressurized spray can. (3) The woman walks back toward a white kitchen island table. On the table, several snack boxes and a smartphone are visible. She looks down at the floor area beneath the table. (4) She squats down low, holding the spray can with both hands, and begins spraying repeatedly into the narrow gap under the base of the white table. Her long dark hair obscures most of her face as she focuses on the ground. (5) As she continues to spray, a hand enters from the top left corner of the frame, pointing toward the floor. The setting remains brightly lit by indoor overhead lights.

(1) The video opens with a main creator, a man with brown hair wearing a white t-shirt, jumping energetically on a street pavement alongside two women. They are all smiling and waving their hands excitedly toward the camera, which is held at eye-level. The background shows a modern building exterior under bright natural daylight. (2) The scene cuts to the man standing alone, speaking directly to the camera with an animated facial expression. He wears a white 'Human Made' brand t-shirt and camouflage patterned shorts, with a brown backpack on his shoulders. The setting is an urban walkway with cars passing by in the background. (3) A sequence follows showing several women in an indoor/covered area attempting to put on tight black and green wetsuits. One woman with a braid laughs as she struggles with the zipper, while another person helps her pull the suit up. They are standing on green artificial turf. (4) The focus shifts to an outdoor harbor area where a group of people are gathered near a white passenger van. A man in a white tank top and glasses sits at a wooden table speaking, while women in wetsuits stand behind him, some adjusting their hair or smiling at the conversation. (5) There are several quick cuts to individual interviews where a woman speaks in front of a neutral grey wall indoors, and later another woman speaks while standing outdoors near diving equipment. Their expressions are cheerful and expressive as they gesture with their hands. (6) Multiple underwater shots are shown, featuring divers in full gear swimming through murky green water near a sandy and rocky seabed. Air bubbles rise from their regulators as they use hand signals to communicate. One diver surfaces in the water, wearing a mask and snorkel, and looks towards the camera with a wide-eyed, excited expression.

(1) The video begins with a medium close-up of a young male with brown hair, wearing a yellow crew-neck t-shirt and professional black headphones with a visible logo. He is standing in front of a silver condenser microphone with a mesh pop filter. He sings with high emotional intensity, frequently squinting his eyes and opening his mouth wide to hit certain notes. His right hand is visible, making small, expressive gestures in the air to accompany the melody. The background is a simple, light-blue pleated curtain, providing a clean studio aesthetic. The lighting is bright and even, likely from a studio source. (2) As the song progresses, the man continues his performance in the same setting. He maintains his emotional delivery, with his facial expressions reflecting the sentimental nature of the lyrics. He occasionally looks slightly away from the microphone as he breathes. His hands are more active in this phase, sometimes palms up or fingers curled as if grasping the emotion of the song. The lighting remains constant, and the camera stays static, focusing on his upper body and head. Small subtitles in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom center of the frame. (3) In the final section, the performer reaches the climax of the song. His vocal delivery becomes more powerful, indicated by his wider mouth movements and increased bodily tension. He tilts his head slightly back while holding a long note. The condenser microphone remains stationary in the foreground. The light blue curtain behind him stays static, and no other people or objects enter the frame. The video concludes with him finishing the phrase and relaxing his posture slightly as the screen fades out.

(1) The video begins outdoors on a green artificial turf pathway. A man in an olive green quilted jacket and a striped shirt stands in the center, gesturing with his hands and pointing to the side. The background features bare winter trees, a lawn, and distant buildings under an overcast sky. (2) The scene cuts to a clothing store interior with bright studio-style lighting. Racks of diverse garments are visible. A red sign with white text "PRICE DOWN" stands on a rack. The man picks up a black and white striped long-sleeved shirt to examine the price tag. (3) He moves to another section, holding a thick, fluffy red and white striped hoodie. A woman in a grey fleece jacket appears, holding the same item next to her face, smiling broadly. (4) Back outdoors, a group of four men stands on the green turf. One man wears a black beanie and mask, holding a large grey Balenciaga shopping bag. The others point at the bag in excitement. (5) In a different indoor setting, a man with long dark hair and glasses holds up a chunky light blue sneaker for the camera. The main character looks on with a curious and slightly surprised facial expression. (6) Returning to the shop, the man holds a large heart-patterned pink pillow, then switches to a green camouflage patterned pillow. Background shelves are filled with colorful merchandise. (7) He is seen crouching on a wooden floor, looking closely at a pair of black sneakers. A person in plaid trousers stands beside him, holding a clipboard. (8) He holds up a small red children's sweatshirt with a Santa Claus print and a price tag, then shows a similar beige one with a holiday graphic. (9) Finally, he stands near a rack of puffy winter jackets in various colors like purple and green, gesturing toward them while looking at the camera with an animated expression.

(1) The video opens on a green outdoor basketball court where a man in a white padded jacket and a woman in a yellow and blue vest are standing. The man gestures excitedly towards the background as they talk. Behind them, other individuals are playing basketball near a hoop. (2) A sharp cut shows a young child in a bright yellow and red patterned outfit looking through a circular plastic window of a wooden playground structure. He waves his hands against the glass, smiling brightly. (3) The scene shifts to a playground with wood chips on the ground. A man in a black sweatshirt is pushing two young children on swings. The children are laughing as they swing high into the air. Bare trees and a fence are visible in the background. (4) A young boy in the same colorful outfit is seen riding a tire swing attached to a zipline. He glides across a grassy area, gripping the center pole tightly. He reaches the end, steps off, and strikes a pose with a big smile. (5) A man and woman walk past a red running track toward a massive Banyan tree. Built into the tree is a wooden treehouse with ladders. A child is seen climbing the wooden steps while an adult assists from below. (6) In a covered outdoor area, a man in a blue tracksuit attempts to climb a vertical metal pole. Several children and another man watch. One child playfully pulls at the climber's pants, causing laughter among the group. (7) The man in a striped pink shirt and the woman in a white hoodie stand in front of 'Changkeng Elementary School'. They are laughing and gesturing. Behind them is a school building with mural art on the walls. (8) They explore a mossy concrete tunnel that looks like an old air-raid shelter. They crouch down to enter the circular opening. (9) The camera focuses on a wooden sign that reads 'Toilet' with text indicating it won a gold medal in New Taipei City. (10) A chaotic scene unfolds on a large red running track surrounded by mountains. Kids run toward the camera, and a woman in a blue vest with green balls attached runs across the field. (11) The video concludes with the man and woman walking on the track, pointing towards the scenic mountains and the crowded playground filled with families.

(1) A man with short brown hair, dressed in a turquoise t-shirt over a white long-sleeved shirt and blue jeans, stands in a brightly lit indoor studio with beige walls and minimalist cabinets. He gestures energetically with wooden chopsticks in his hand, smiling broadly at the camera. (2) A woman with long black hair wearing an olive green hoodie enters the frame from the left; they stand behind a white counter where three small white bowls containing cooked seafood rings are placed. (3) The woman uses chopsticks to pick up a piece of food from the bowls, tasting it while the man looks on with an exaggerated, expectant expression. (4) Close-up shots of the bowls show different varieties of sliced squid and octopus on a white surface under bright, even studio lighting. (5) The man holds a smartphone close to the camera, displaying a webpage with the 'Taiwan Mobile' logo and various promotion details; his facial expressions shift to a serious, informative look as he points at the screen. (6) A series of screen recordings show the smartphone interface scrolling through streaming service packages including Netflix, Disney+, and MyVideo. (7) Back to the duo, the man picks up a bowl and shows it to the lens, revealing the contents while speaking with high energy. (8) The video concludes with the man and woman performing a synchronized energetic dance and heart-shaped hand gestures against the same studio background.

(1) A man with short brown hair and a white/black striped sweater talks to a person wearing a large orange cartoon mask and a red hoodie. They are in a brightly lit room with a brown leather couch and shelves filled with colorful toys and figurines in the background. (2) The camera focus shifts to the man in the striped sweater, who displays exaggerated facial expressions of excitement and shock. He uses animated hand gestures while looking directly into the lens. The background features a domestic-style studio with soft overhead lighting and decorative items. (3) Various women, dressed in casual sweaters and skirts, approach a large cardboard box labeled with text. They reach out to open the box lid. The setting is a large, open indoor studio with white walls and studio lighting equipment visible in the far corners. (4) Fast cuts show the man's head popping out of the box unexpectedly as the lids are lifted. The victims jump back with wide eyes and open mouths, their hands flying up in surprise. Large colorful text overlays with jagged borders appear frequently on the screen. (5) The filming perspective shifts to inside the box, looking up as a woman opens it. Her face fills the frame, showing a transition from curious expectation to sudden fright, then quickly to a wide smile and laughter. The lighting remains consistent and bright.

(1) A man with messy black hair and a red shirt smiles broadly at the camera, holding a cardboard box with blue tape. An inset box at the bottom left shows another man's face in a striped shirt, frozen in an extreme open-mouthed shock expression. The background is a white indoor ceiling with recessed lighting. (2) The scene cuts to a woman with short dark hair in a gray shirt who is screaming intensely with her mouth wide open and eyes squeezed shut. The shocked-face inset remains constant. (3) A man with black curly hair and thick black-rimmed glasses leans over the box, looking down with a focused and surprised expression in a room with warm wooden furniture. (4) Cut to a man with short black hair and a dark shirt opening his mouth in a wide, exaggerated shout or yawn towards the camera. (5) A woman with her hair tied back is shown mid-scream, with her eyes wide and eyebrows raised in mock terror. (6) A woman wearing a black mask and a striped sweater looks down into the box with a composed yet curious gaze, while another person is partially visible in the background.

(1) The video presents a high-resolution, wide-angle view of a modern living room and dining area, captured from a high fixed position. In the foreground, a plush grey sofa sits on the right, bordering a dark green area rug that holds two nested wooden circular coffee tables. The midground features a long, low wooden TV console topped with various small green potted plants and a large, black flat-screen television. To the right of the console, a dining set with a light-colored wooden table and four matching chairs is visible, situated near a dark brown entrance door and a wooden staircase. The lighting is bright and uniform, suggesting strong indoor overhead lights illuminating the entire open-plan space. (2) The entire visual frame suddenly experiences a series of intense, rapid horizontal and vertical vibrations. The camera perspective jitters violently, making the walls, furniture, and objects appear to shake as if during a significant seismic event. Despite the vigorous motion of the camera frame, large objects like the sofa, TV, and dining table do not appear to slide across the floor or topple over, though the intensity of the shaking is visually pronounced. (3) The violent shaking of the frame abruptly stops, and the scene returns to a completely static state. The room's arrangement remains identical to the first phase, with all furniture and decorations, including the small plants on the TV stand and the items on the kitchen counter in the background, appearing undisturbed. The lighting conditions remain consistent and bright, and the static wide-angle perspective of the room is maintained until the end of the recording.

(1) The video begins with a man with short brown hair wearing a brown, orange, and white striped polo shirt. He stands in a brightly lit indoor room with wooden floors, holding small slips of white paper and looking intensely at them with a focused expression. A crowd of people, including a woman in a red hoodie and grey beanie, surrounds him, watching with anticipation and smiling in the background. (2) The man interacts with a woman wearing a grey beanie and a red hoodie as they appear to be participating in a drawing or card game. Other individuals in the background are laughing, clapping, and gesturing towards the main character, creating a high-energy social atmosphere. The camera uses handheld movements to track the excitement, focusing on their varied facial expressions and reactions. (3) A man in a beige sweater is introduced, holding a large playing card with a decorative red geometric pattern on the back. He displays it with a dramatic flair while the crowd reacts with wide-eyed surprise and laughter. The lighting remains consistent and bright throughout the scene, highlighting the domestic indoor environment and various background figures. (4) The man in the striped shirt is seen holding a massive deck of oversized playing cards against his chest. He looks nervous and focused as the crowd behind him raises their hands and cheers enthusiastically. He prepares to draw a card while the camera captures the physical tension in his posture and the surrounding people's eager faces. (5) The climax occurs as the man slaps down an Ace of clubs onto the wooden table. He immediately erupts into a celebration, jumping up and down with his arms raised high in the air. The crowd joins in the celebration, with people hugging him and cheering, while vibrant text overlays and graphic effects appear on the screen.

(1) The scene begins in a brightly lit indoor studio with wood-paneled walls. A male character wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a black collar line (Cai Aga) stands on the left, holding a stack of oversized playing cards with a red geometric pattern. A female character (Er Gu) in a pale green knit sweater stands to his right, looking at the cards. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the table surface where two cards, a Queen of Diamonds and a 5 of Hearts, are placed apart. The male character's hand is visible holding the rest of the deck. (3) The female character is shown jumping and spinning in excitement, her face wide with a joyful expression. The male character looks toward the camera with a dejected, exaggerated frown. (4) A rapid montage sequence follows, showing various indoor group settings with multiple people cheering and playing the same game. There are high-contrast edits and digital zoom effects on the participants' faces. (5) Returning to the main setting, the male character places a final card, the 10 of Clubs, between the two initial cards. The female character covers her mouth with her hands in shock and delight. (6) The male character looks directly into the lens, grimacing and making a mock-angry face as the female character continues to laugh and clap in the background.

(1) A group of five young adults, including a central man in a black jacket and a woman in a green hoodie, are visible praying. They hold bundles of burning incense sticks, performing synchronized bowing motions toward the temple altar. The setting is the interior of a traditional temple featuring a bright red ceiling and intricately carved stone pillars. Yellow subtitles appear at the bottom. (2) Two young women wearing white face masks wave their hands enthusiastically and clap for the camera in an outdoor setting. The background consists of a flat urban parking lot with several silver cars parked behind a red and white gate. The lighting is natural, bright daylight. A white heart and the character '爺' appear as variety text overlays on their faces. (3) In a close-up shot focusing on hands, a person is seen placing individual snack packages and a white sheet of paper onto a series of red plastic offering trays. The objects include crackers, juice cartons, and a metal tabletop. The environment remains the temple interior, though the background is blurred to emphasize the objects. (7) A close-up shows a hand holding a 'KidZania' 10-dollar bill. The kids then ride a yellow 'Hato Bus' sightseeing vehicle through a simulated city street. (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of a hand with red nail polish holding a red package of noodles against a white kitchen background. The lighting is bright and even. (3) The thin white noodles are placed into a black pot filled with boiling water. The water is bubbling vigorously, and steam is visible. A pair of wooden chopsticks is used to submerge the noodles completely. (4) In a blue and white patterned ceramic bowl, a hand cracks a brown egg. The yellow yolk and clear whites fall into the bowl alongside two previously cracked eggs. The camera remains at a close-up angle. (5) A liquid from a white sachet is poured into the bowl with the eggs. A pair of chopsticks is then used to whisk the eggs and liquid together with rapid circular motions until well combined. (6) The boiled white noodles are lifted out of the pot and placed directly into the bowl of beaten egg mixture. The noodles are then tossed with the chopsticks to ensure each strand is thoroughly coated in yellow liquid. (7) A white spray bottle is used to apply oil to the surface of a black non-stick frying pan. The pan is sitting on an induction cooktop. The lighting remains bright and natural. (8) The noodle and egg mixture is poured from the blue bowl into the heated pan. The mixture spreads out into a circular shape. Chopsticks are used to level the surface and distribute the noodles evenly across the pan. (9) A white silicone spatula is used to lift the edge of the pancake, checking for doneness. The pancake is then flipped over, revealing a crispy, golden-brown crust. The sound of sizzling is implied by the visual of small bubbles. (10) The final cooked pancake is presented on a dark brown plate placed on a light wood surface. Natural sunlight casts a soft shadow, and a digital emoji of a face with a tongue sticking out appears in the frame.

The camera pans across the traditional temple architecture, showing the intricate red wooden pillars and tiled roofs under soft, natural daylight. (3) The family enters the temple grounds, passing by a ticketing sign. They walk through a grand red gate toward a bridge over a scenic pond. The mother is seen filming and taking photos while the children explore the pebble-covered paths. Many other tourists are visible in the background, adding to the lively atmosphere of the religious site. (4) The mother and one son participate in a stamp-collecting activity. They use a large wooden stamp to mark a postcard at one of the temple's designated stations.
